positions.label: Operation Ring: attacking from the south

sources.citation: Glantz, D. & House, J. — Stalingrad trilogy (To the Gates of Stalingrad; Armageddon in Stalingrad; Endgame at Stalingrad), 2009–2014

su-army-64.notes: Pilot coverage: Don approaches to the city victory. Captured Paulus’ HQ sector on 31 Jan 1943.
